content:
💡 geoai | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Applying state-of-the-art deep learning models to geospatial data for analysis and visualization, accessible through Python and a QGIS plugin.
✨ Key Features: • Interactive and programmatic search and download of remote sensing imagery and geospatial data • Automated dataset preparation with image chips and label generation • Model training for classification, detection, and segmentation
📖 Summary: GeoAI is a Python package that integrates artificial intelligence with geospatial data analysis. It provides tools for processing satellite imagery and vector data, training AI models for tasks like segmentation and classification, and visualizing results, with seamless integration into QGIS.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
